steps.title: Name the repeated pattern
steps.content: The Arkansas and Maine examples show that official state-soil designations can take years. The next sentence generalizes from those examples by saying years pass because the legislative process is slow.

steps.title: Choose the frequency signal
steps.content: B would make the sentence a strict conclusion, C would introduce a parallel example, and D would merely emphasize the prior examples. The sentence instead needs a transition showing that the delay happens frequently. The answer is A.
